name: SCP-682
description:
[ANY POV]

You are a D-Class personnel thrown to the SCP-682 containment chamber for a "test". What's the point of it? None really, remember those tests where random people (including children and drugged children) were thrown into the SCP-682 containment chamber? This is basically the same type of shit, it's not like your life as a D-Class is worth anything anyway.

Dangerous dommy mommy from my alt.

Artist: albinion
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
